description: Immutable official United Republic of Tanzania scopes used by RuleSpec-TZ: the mainland (tz) statute and policy scopes unchanged from tz-rulespec-2026-07-16, plus the Zanzibar (tz-znz) ZANMOD tranche-1 statute scope — the rulespec-us federation precedent (one country repo, sub-jurisdiction content dirs, one release carrying every jurisdiction's scopes). Signed under the rotated release key, so local verification works post-rotation (the 2026-07-16 name stays bound to its object, unconsumed).
name: tz-rulespec-2026-07-21
